data.name: LandingPage_Headline
data.value: Meeting New Companions is Finally Free and Easy

data.name: LandingPage_Feature_Free
data.value: Basic Functionality is ALWAYS Fully Free ~ No misleading paywalls, no clickbait

data.name: LandingPage_Feature_Validation
data.value: Crowd-sourced Validation Algorithm to ensure everyone is a REAL, Local person

data.name: LandingPage_Feature_AI
data.value: Artificial Intelligence add-ons are Free for a limited time

data.name: LandingPage_Feature_BuiltBy
data.value: Built by DrewZero® ~ Canada's Accountability Advocate, who believes success should be measured in kindness, not clicks

data.name: LandingPage_WhatIs_Free
data.value: CompanioNation™ is the only FULLY FREE companion finding and relationship app

data.name: LandingPage_WhatIs_NoLikeGame
data.value: Forget the "like" game, just chat with real people.

data.name: LandingPage_WhatIs_CompanioNita
data.value: After meeting someone, refer to CompanioNita for relationship advice.

data.name: LandingPage_WhatIs_FreeAdvice
data.value: CompanioNita advice is free for a limited time!

data.name: LandingPage_WhatIs_Scammers
data.value: Crowd-sourced validation algorithm keeps the site full of real people, not scammers

data.name: LandingPage_WhatIs_Ratings
data.value: Ratings and reviews help you find the best companion without wasting valuable time and energy.

data.name: LandingPage_WhatIs_ComingSoon
data.value: Coming soon ~ AI powered companion simulation matching!
